resources.name: UGC Content Factory
resources.notes: Director-first UGC content generation using Kling 3.0 via fal.ai. 4-module pipeline: Creative Director → Cinematographer → Screenwriter → Engineer. Visuals-before-script approach.

resources.name: Claude SEO
resources.notes: Comprehensive SEO analysis skill. Covers technical SEO, on-page, E-E-A-T, schema markup, sitemap, AI search optimization (GEO). Includes 6 sub-agents and Python scripts.

resources.name: Vibe Marketing Skills v2
resources.download_origin: Private — Vibe Marketers community (Skool). Downloaded as Vibe-Skills-v2-Claude-Code.zip.
resources.notes: 11 marketing skills bundle built for Claude Code. Shared brand memory system, JSON schema contracts, multi-skill workflows. Includes: start-here, brand-voice, positioning-angles, keyword-research, seo-content, direct-response-copy, email-sequences, lead-magnet, newsletter, content-atomizer, creative.

resources.name: Vibe Marketing 101 (n8n)
resources.notes: n8n workflow bundle: Feedback Loop, Reddit content research, Reddit scale content production.

resources.name: Local Market Research (n8n)
resources.notes: Local market research and newsletter creation workflow. Uses Apify for data collection. Includes OAuth Google Sheets integration.

resources.name: Content Scaling (n8n)
resources.notes: Content scaling n8n workflow bundle: YouTube research, keyword alerts, Slack content creation, repurposing agent, YouTube viral script agent.

resources.name: Creative Variant Generator
resources.download_origin: Private — downloaded as creative-variant-generator.zip. Source community unknown.
resources.notes: Generates ad creative variations from a reference winning ad. Supports OpenAI gpt-image-1.5 and Google Gemini backends. Configurable divergence levels: subtle, moderate, dramatic.

resources.name: Google Search Campaign Builder
resources.download_origin: Private — downloaded as search-campaign-builder.zip. Source community unknown.
resources.notes: Takes a landing page URL and builds a complete Google Search campaign. Senior PPC strategy skill. Perry Marshall / Brad Geddes methodology.

resources.name: Vibe Marketing Kit
resources.notes: Reference documentation kit: site exec summary, market dynamics, influencer patterns, content gap analysis, revenue projection, digital presence audit, MCP setup guides.
